summary: Implemented full legacy-to-MCP modernization for PetClinic: created Pet.java and PetType.java POJOs matching the OpenAPI schema, PetRestClient.java interface with @RegisterRestClient targeting GET /api/pets and GET /api/pets/{petId}, PetMcpServer.java @ApplicationScoped bean exposing two @Tool methods (listPets and getPetById) returning ToolResponse with JSON TextContent via Jackson ObjectMapper, populated application.properties with port 8888/CORS/REST client URL, and updated Kubernetes manifest to add petclinic-mcp sidecar container on port 8888 with a dedicated Service resource.
